title: Head-On Speed Duel
description: Two players charge head-on. Player A is moving at a clearly higher speed than Player B. Higher-speed player should win the collision or close-speed cases resolve readably — never randomly.

expected_outcomes.description: Player A (higher speed) wins the collision — Player B is knocked down or deflected.

must_not_outcomes.description: Winner is determined by RNG rather than speed/skill inputs.

notes: P-060 is explicit: skill delta must be legible. Close-speed outcomes can be defined (e.g. mutual knockdown) but must not be random. Speed includes powerup-modified speeds.
